title: Electromagnetic Research Working Group
content:
Electromagnetic Research Working Group

Research Focus

Electromagnetic field for occupational health and safety in hospitals and institutions according to EN 50413 standard, electromagnetic pollution examination and measurement, EMC problems and solutions, base stations and high voltage line measurements, electromagnetic radiation exposure awareness studies in schools, to provide consultancy services to municipalities on issues related to urban planning and licensing procedures, to reduce Electromagnetic Radiation exposure levels in buildings.
